ul.li: Memory Safety: No slot is reused until ref_count == 0.
Atomic Operations: ref_count updates must use std::atomic fetch-sub.
Fences: Write-Store must follow a Release fence; Read-Load must follow an Acquire fence.
Liveness: If a subscriber crashes, the Watchdog service must decrement the ref_count to prevent deadlock.

div.p: Note: Contention on the ref_count cache line during high N (subscriber count) can induce MESI protocol stalls.

g.text: Slot is available in the Ring Buffer for the Producer to claim.
Producer has written data and published the slot. Waiting for first reader.
Multiple subscribers are actively processing the data in-place.
Only one subscriber remains. The next ACK will trigger reclamation.
